## Why

Explain the defect, evaluation risk, or capability this change addresses and why this repository layer owns it.

## What Changed

- Describe the smallest coherent implementation.

## Evidence

- `command`: result and named scenario covered

## Trust And Compatibility

- [ ] I considered manifest, corpus, comparator, provider, result, and package compatibility.
- [ ] I preserved or intentionally versioned source bindings, isolation, spend accounting, blinding, and release authority.
- [ ] I added adversarial calibration for changed oracle behavior.
- [ ] I added a changelog entry for a user-visible or compatibility change.
- [ ] I removed credentials, private holdout content, live evidence, results, caches, and host-specific paths.

## Review Guide

Name the files and invariants reviewers should inspect first, plus any residual risk or test not run.
